race.comment: MOVIE NIGHT (8) well-bred Tivaci filly set to deliver fourth-up. Covered ground early and knocked up in the straight with the 58.5kg to run third over 1400m at Hawkesbury. Best figures measure up and no excuses today. ARTGIRL (7) deep into the campaign and unlucky not to have already shed her Maiden tag. Savaged the line with a respectable second to the handy Agraffe Rocket over 1400m at this track on the heavy surface. Well placed from the low draw and shapes as the main danger. COPARTNER PEGASUS (2) consistent gelding with his hoof on the till. Was well fancied last time when he jumped sharply in trip with a plugging third over 1600m at Gosford after being in contention on the corner. Back in trip and must be considered. INDIGO STAR (4) big improver second-up when he launched late from back in the field with a respectable second over 1350m at Wyong. Will appreciate the roomier track despite drawing out. Respect.
